# PULSEWIRE

> A minimalist neon-noir wire-tracing thriller for iOS. You trace one living wire through a swarm of hunting patrols to its sink. Safe play locks you out; the only points worth having are stolen by skimming death — graze a patrol by a hair for a NEAR-DEATH +1000 and time fractures into slow motion.

PULSEWIRE is a single-player, one-finger arcade game made by Divera Game Studio. It is 100% offline: no ads, no accounts, no in-app data collection. Free on the Apple App Store (iOS 17.0 or later): https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pulsewire/id6778034497

## Core mechanics

- **Trace, don't tap**: hold and drag one finger to guide a wire from a source to a sink.
- **Skim to score**: the closer you graze a hostile patrol without touching it, the higher you score. A hair's-breadth pass is a NEAR-DEATH +1000.
- **Rewind, don't die**: lift to drop an anchor; if you get clipped you rewind to it instead of dying — taxed on every use.
- **Core Breach**: thread an atom core for +2000.
- **21 nodes**: difficulty ramps from clean lanes to SYSTEM CRASH, with a dozen hostile enemy classes.
- **Architect Mode**: clear all 21 levels in sequence to unlock a built-in level editor.
